resources.string: PDF open karne ke liye file manager se PDF choose karo.
Jab tak ye app PDF ke liye default nahi set hoti, app tumhe settings par le jayegi. Wapas aake "Maine set kar diya" dabao.
Great, ab ye app PDF default set ho gayi.
Abhi default set nahi hua. Settings me viewer ko PDF ke liye allow karo.
Is device par default settings screen available nahi hai.
